sourceNotes: Phase 2 Arkadia OSM identity/location pass 2026-05-27: OpenStreetMap natural=beach same-name or compatible-name match is 0m from stored coordinates and supports identity/location only.

Next popular-region confidence pass 2026-06-02: TyrosNews directly supports the Agios Christoforos/Zaritsi beach identity, 5 km distance from Tyros, pebble terrain, and camping/rooms/beach-bar/taverna service context. The 2026 official Peloponnese bathing-water monitoring document lists Zaritsi-Agios Christoforos with sampling coordinates, supporting official beach identity. Manto Studios independently supports the Zaritsi/Agios Christoforos location. Water depth was changed to medium because the reviewed sources do not document a clear shallow-water claim. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 44: GreekMap page supports Atsigganos beach identity/location in Arkadia. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Blue Flag 2026 import 2026-06-01: official Blue Flag Greece awards page lists one or more matching awarded beach sections for this record. Static certification metadata only; coordinates, access, windProfile, scoring, photos, confidence and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Popular confidence pass BK 2026-06-02: Discover Kynouria directly supports Atsinganos as a well-known Kynouria beach with sand and pebbles, trees along the beach setting, shallow warm water with depth increasing around five metres from shore, an organized section with umbrellas, loungers, WC, showers, bins and waste baskets, lifeguard base, refreshment stand, racket/football areas, vehicle parking at the southern end and sailing availability. The official Blue Flag 2026 awards page lists Atsinganos in Arkadia / North Kynouria. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; unsupported taverna/cafe-nearby wording was replaced with the directly supported refreshment-stand and parking context. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

blueFlag2026.source: Blue Flag Greece official awarded beaches list 2026

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 44: Discover Kynouria page supports Xiropigado beach identity/location in Arkadia/Kynouria. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Blue Flag 2026 import 2026-06-01: official Blue Flag Greece awards page lists one or more matching awarded beach sections for this record. Static certification metadata only; coordinates, access, windProfile, scoring, photos, confidence and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Popular confidence pass BI 2026-06-02: Discover Kynouria directly supports Xiropigado beach identity in Kynouria, pebbly beach character, tourist infrastructure, hotels/rooms and fish tavernas, while its settlement page and the official Blue Flag 2026 awards page support the organized Blue-Flag-awarded Xiropigado section in North Kynouria. VisitKynouria supports the Kiveri-Astros road-address context and repeats pebbles, tourist infrastructure and fish tavernas. Promoted to high for static facts only; unsupported coarse-sand, shallow-water, natural-shade and parking claims were removed or neutralized. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Water depth was set to medium and natural shade removed because these are not directly supported for the exact app record. Confidence promoted to high; windProfile, scoring, coordinates and photos were not changed.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3L source check 2026-05-25: AllOverGreece describes Tigani/Fournaka north of Tyros with very easy access via the Astros-Leonidio provincial road, seasonal refreshments, umbrellas, loungers, taverna, water sports, showers, changing rooms, and toilet. Corrected from difficult path to easy road access and organized seasonal services.

Peloponnese source pass CQ2 2026-06-05: AllOverGreece and All About Peloponnisos directly support Tigani/Fournaka identity near Tyros, pebbly coast/seabed, easy access, seasonal refreshments, sunbeds/umbrellas, tavern, water-sports/snorkeling/cave context and family-friendly/non-remote character. Depth was made neutral because sources do not document a stable shallow/deep class. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.
